title: flatten, techmap: don't canonicalize tpl driven bits via sigmap

features.name: inout port driven by assign from another signal
features.description: Code should include a module with an inout port that is driven by an assign statement from another signal

features.name: inout port instantiation with constant
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a constant value is passed to an inout port, triggering sigmap canonicalization issues during flatten
